text: BMFA Airplane B certificate, sequence reset.
Fly a figure of eight course: with the cross over point in front of pilot, height to be constant.
Fly into wind and complete one inside loop, managing throttle carefully on the exit of the loop.
Fly downwind and complete one outside loop; once again, managing the throttle carefully.
Complete two consecutive rolls into wind; with little hesitation and no serious loss of height.
Complete two consecutive rolls downwind; using the opposite direction of roll rotation; with little hesitation and no serious loss of height.
Complete a stall turn, either left or right, with direction of stall away from the flight line.
Gain height, and perform a three-turn spin, with initial heading and recovery heading into wind.
Fly a rectangular landing approach and overshoot with an abort from below 10 feet.
Fly a rectangular circuit in the opposite direction, at a constant height of not more than 40 feet.
